ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Biscuit (69%) [Wheat Flour, Sugar, Palm Oil, Glucose Syrup, Raising Agents (Ammonium Hydrogen Carbonate, Sodium Hydrogen Carbonate), Whole Milk Powder, Salt, Rapeseed Oil], Icing (31%) [Icing Sugar, Beef Gelatine, Colour (Beet Red)]
